verdict_reasoning: TGFB1 is secreted but forms the Large Latent Complex where LAP remains non-covalently associated with mature TGF-β1 and is covalently tethered via LTBP to ECM and to cell-surface anchors such as GARP/LRRC32 and LRRC33 through disulfide bonds. This wash-resistant covalent tethering to a TM partner (GARP on Tregs/platelets) presents latent TGF-β1 on the cell surface and is the basis of clinical anti-GARP/TGF-β1 antibody programs.
